summary: Estimator-regime lemma (Lemma 1 + Prop 2 + Prop 3) for claim:capacity-matched-pvi verified PASS after one fix round; gaps closed (label-independent construction, finite-sum in-sample divergence, bounded-logit floor with k<n_val demoted to motivation).

issues_round1.note: Lemma 1 construction conditioned on label / 'bounded elsewhere' unjustified — FIXED: q_ε(c|x)=ε label-independent, finite-sum bound.
Cover/Soudry multiclass imprecision; training-confidence != held-out; existential Lemma-1 misuse — FIXED: restricted to in-sample interpolation regime, direct finite-sum divergence, Lyu-Li for K>2.
'derives the numbers' — FIXED: narrowed to asymptotic existence-mechanism.
k<n_val unused; PVI>=log σ_min − log p(y) wrong (y random); 'independent of d' needs B fixed — FIXED: PVI>=log2 σ_min + H(Y); B fixed indep of d; k<n_val demoted to enabler.

details.round2_verdict: PASS (all gaps closed; 'generic attractor' wording note non-blocking since interpolation is an explicit hypothesis)
